Headshot kills grant +1 skill tier for 10s, up to 3.
Killing an enemy with a status effect grants +20% weapon damage for 10s.
Kills repair 2% armor over 3s.
+20% weapon damage to burning enemies.
Kills reduce skill cooldowns by 10%.
+15% critical hit chance for the first bullet in each magazine.
+35% weapon damage when no attachments are equipped.
+5% weapon damage per skill tier equipped (up to +30% at tier 6). Resets on weapon swap.
Kills grant a stack of +1% weapon damage (up to 50). Stacks reset on reload or weapon swap.
Hitting 30 body shots grants +20% weapon damage. Hitting 30 headshots grants +20% crit damage. Both can be active simultaneously.
Perturb: While holstered, generates 50% less threat. After 10s holstered, primes the weapon. On swap-in: +25% Rate of Fire, +30% Weapon Damage, +100% threat for 20s. Swapping away
Marks a target on aim. Damage to marked target increases by 5% per 0.5s aimed (up to +50%).
Shots apply Plague of the Outcasts. Enemies with the plague that die spread it to nearby enemies.
Every 10 bullets fired grants +5% weapon damage (up to +50%). Resets on reload.
Shots apply Bleed, Burn, and Shock. Enemies affected by all 3 take +20% weapon damage.
Headshot kills create a 5m explosion dealing 400% weapon damage and applying bleed to all nearby enemies.
Hitting an enemy applies a stack (shared between players). At 5 stacks, the enemy forcefully targets the last player to apply a stack for 5s and takes +25% more damage to armor.
+25% weapon damage for 20s after your shield is destroyed.
Shots apply Elmo's Mark. Marked enemies take +20% weapon damage from all sources.
Swapping to this weapon grants +10% Rate of Fire and +9% Weapon Damage for 10s. Swapping from grants +5% Rate of Fire and +4.5% Weapon Damage for 10s. Two instances do not stack.
Swapping to this weapon grants +13% Rate of Fire and +12% Weapon Damage for 10s. Swapping from grants +5% Rate of Fire and +4.5% Weapon Damage for 10s. Two instances do not stack.
Shooting from cover marks the target. Marked targets take +20% weapon damage from all sources. Mark lasts 5s.
Switching to full-auto mode grants +20% weapon damage and +20% rate of fire for 5s. Switching to semi-auto mode grants +50% headshot damage for 5s.
Kills grant a stack of +5% weapon damage (max 10). Stacks are lost when you reload or swap weapons.
Shots apply Unnerve. Unnerved enemies deal -20% damage. Killing an Unnerved enemy grants +20% weapon damage for 10s.
Kills grant +5% rate of fire for 5s, stacking up to 10 times. At max stacks, gain +50% weapon damage for 5s.
Kills with a full magazine grant +20% rate of fire for 10s. Reloading within 5s of a kill refills the magazine from reserves.
Shots apply a stack of Bluescreen. At 10 stacks, the enemy is disrupted for 5s and takes +20% weapon damage for 10s.
Kills do not consume ammo from the magazine. Reloading removes this effect until the next kill.
While aiming, shots deal +20% weapon damage. Shots that hit the same target within 1s deal an additional +5% weapon damage, stacking up to 5 times.
Kills grant +5% weapon damage for 10s, stacking up to 10 times. At max stacks, gain +20% rate of fire for 10s.
Kills repair 5% of your armor. Headshot kills repair 10% of your armor.
Every 10th shot is a guaranteed critical hit and applies a random status effect. Shots that hit a status-affected enemy deal +20% weapon damage.
Kills repair 5% of your armor. Headshot kills repair 10% of your armor and grant +20% weapon damage for 10s.
Each shot applies a Primer. Shooting a Primed enemy with the secondary fire detonates all Primers, dealing 800% weapon damage per Primer.
Each shot applies a Primer. Shooting a Primed enemy with the secondary fire detonates all Primers, dealing 800% weapon damage per Primer.
Kills grant a stack of +5% weapon damage (max 10). At max stacks, the next shot deals 500% weapon damage.
Shots apply a stack of Ortiz Protocol. At 10 stacks, the next shot deals 300% weapon damage and applies a random status effect.
Headshots apply a stack of Full Stop. At 5 stacks, the next shot deals 500% weapon damage and staggers the target.
Kills grant Stealth for 3s. While in Stealth, the next shot deals +100% weapon damage and is a guaranteed critical hit.
Headshots mark the target for 10s. Shots against marked targets deal +20% weapon damage. Killing a marked target grants +30% weapon damage for 10s.
Shots apply a stack of The Trap. At 5 stacks, the target is immobilized for 5s and takes +30% weapon damage for 10s.
Kills grant +20% weapon damage for 10s. Headshot kills extend this bonus by 5s.
Shots apply a stack of Capitulate. At 10 stacks, the target is disrupted for 5s and takes +25% weapon damage for 10s.
Kills grant +5% weapon damage for 10s, stacking up to 5 times. At max stacks, the next shot deals +50% weapon damage.
Shots apply a stack of Whiplash. At 10 stacks, the next shot deals 300% weapon damage and applies bleed.
Kills grant +10% weapon damage for 10s. Headshot kills grant +20% weapon damage for 10s.
+1% Weapon Accuracy and +1% Weapon Stability per bullet shot, up to 75%. Stopping shooting starts a 6s timer, after which bonuses reset.
Reloading from empty grants 80% weapon handling for 10 seconds.
Killing an enemy with a critical hit grants 90% critical hit damage for 10 seconds.
Receive 100% stability at the cost of 35% optimal range.
Amplifies weapon damage by 20% to enemies under status effects. After 3 kills, applies a random status effect to the next enemy hit.
For every 8 bullets in the magazine capacity, gain 3% rate of fire and 3% weapon damage for 9 seconds when reloading from empty.
+15% Rate of Fire.
Amplifies weapon damage by 20% to pulsed enemies. After 3 kills, applies pulse to the next enemy hit.
Increase Weapon Damage by 47% when no Skills are on cooldown.
Every 2 reloads from empty increases your base magazine capacity by 100%.
Weapon kills grant +1 skill tier for 19s. Stacks up to 4 times. Weapon kills at skill tier 6 grant overcharge for 15s. Overcharge Cooldown: 90s.
Deal 30% weapon damage to burning enemies. After 3 kills, applies burning to the next enemy hit.
Killing a target within 7 meters grants 38% weapon damage for 10 seconds.
Weapon damage is increased by 4.5% for every 10% ammo missing from the magazine.
Hitting an enemy grants +20% skill damage for 5s. Using a skill grants +20% weapon damage for 5s. Damage increases are doubled while both buffs are active.
Killing enemies farther than 20m builds up stacks (max 2). Hitting an enemy within 20m uses all stacks to provide +35% Amplified Damage to enemies within 20m for 5s.
Deals 35% extra damage to shocked targets.
Gain 10% critical hit damage for every 0.5 seconds you are firing. Stacks up to 8 times.
Killing an enemy repairs 15% armor over 5 seconds. Headshot kills improves the repair to 30%.
Amplifies weapon damage by 25% to ensnared enemies. After 3 kills, applies Ensnare to the next enemy hit.
After killing an enemy, gain 150% optimal range and 125% accuracy for 10 seconds.
Swapping to this weapon grants 400% weapon handling for 5 seconds. Kills refresh the buff. Swapping away disables this from all weapons for 5 seconds.
The top half of the magazine has +25% rate of fire and -30% weapon damage. The bottom half has -18% rate of fire and +38% weapon damage.
Killing an enemy with a status effect applied grants all group members within 20m 21% critical hit chance and 21% critical hit damage for 20 seconds.
Receive 22% weapon damage at the cost of 25% stability and 25% accuracy.
Deal +35% weapon damage to bleeding enemies. After 3 kills, applies bleed to the next enemy hit.
Critical hits add a stack of 5% reload speed bonus. Max stack is 40.
Increase weapon handling by 40%.
Suppressing an enemy grants 12% weapon damage for 12 seconds. Max stack is 4.
Hits grant a stack of 1% accuracy and stability. At 75 stacks, consumes them to refill the magazine.
Destroying a Weakpoint grants 24% Weapon Damage for 15s.
Landing headshots adds a stack of bonus 11% weapon damage for 5 seconds. Max stack is 6. Additional headshots refresh the duration.
Magazine capacity is increased by 30%. Missed shots from cover have a 100% chance to return to the magazine.
Headshots grant 75% status effect damage and duration to the next status effect you apply. Cooldown: 16 seconds.
Dealing damage with a grenade applies a mark on target. Targets with marks take 40% more damage to armor and -10% movement speed.
Headshots grant 25% skill damage for 15 seconds.
Critical hits have a 75% chance to return the bullet to the magazine. If a bullet is returned, the next shot has 50% increased damage.
Amplifies weapon damage by +25% to enemies that are not targeting you.
Hitting an enemy with no armor grants 50% headshot damage for 8 seconds.
Headshots grant 80% skill repair for 15 seconds.
Amplifies weapon damage by 2% for every 3 meters you are away from the target.
If scoped, your first 2 shots fired from out of combat or after fully reloading from empty deal headshot damage to any part of the body hit. Requires 8x scope or higher.
After killing an enemy with a headshot, the next shot on any enemy is a guaranteed critical headshot. Killing an enemy will not retrigger the talent while active.
Deal 35% weapon damage to blinded enemies. After 3 kills, applies blind to the next enemy hit.
Reloading grants 6% weapon damage for 10 seconds. Stacks up to 5 times.
Increase reload speed by 50%.
2 consecutive kills refill the magazine and grant 40% weapon damage for 10 seconds.
Receive +1% Amplified Damage on the next shot for each pellet that hits the target, if at least 4 pellets hit.
Increased magazine size by 50%.
Increase optimal range by 100%.
Killing a target has a 85% chance to refill the magazine.
Landing body shots adds a stack of bonus 70% headshot damage to the next headshot for 10 seconds. Max stack is 2.
Swapping from this weapon within 10 seconds of killing an enemy grants 35% critical hit chance and 40% critical hit damage for 15 seconds.
Weapon kills grant +1 skill tier for 19s. Stacks up to 3 times. Weapon kills at skill tier 6 grant overcharge for 15s. Overcharge Cooldown: 90s.
Headshots apply confuse. Cooldown: 20s.
